subject: Invoice INV-2026-0005 – May Morningstar Research & Data Subscriptions
preview: Attached is your May invoice for Morningstar Direct, Advisor Workstation, and related data services.
body:
Dear Accounts Payable Team,

Please find attached invoice #INV-2026-0005 for Morningstar research platforms, advisor tools, ESG data, and PitchBook platform access for the May 2026 billing cycle.

Total Amount: USD 31,156.13
Due Date: June 16, 2026
Payment Terms: Net 30

Kindly process payment by the due date. Reference invoice number on remittance. Contact billing@morningstar.com for any questions.

Thank you,
Morningstar, Inc. – Accounts Receivable
